metadata.seed: Okay, so I've had an issue that started about when I was a little bit younger. When I was about ten years old, I was really active. I was playing outside all the time. And my neighbors had large dogs that were always in their yard. They would always be outside running around, and we were separated by a fence. And if I was playing outside or like kicking a ball around or doing anything with a friend, and I had to go after the ball, it would be near the fence. And especially if I wasn't looking, I would be leaning down to grab the ball or just have my back turned. And they would come up, they would be really excited, and they would jump on the fence, and I never would be expecting it, and they would always startle me, and I would always feel this sense of fear and uneasiness around them. And so I've kind of always been a little bit more uncomfortable around dogs since all of that happened.

patient.query: Okay, so I've had an issue that started about when I was a little bit younger. When I was about ten years old, I was really active. I was playing outside all the time. And my neighbors had large dogs that were always in their yard. They would always be outside running around, and we were separated by a fence. And if I was playing outside or like kicking a ball around or doing anything with a friend, and I had to go after the ball, it would be near the fence. And especially if I wasn't looking, I would be leaning down to grab the ball or just have my back turned. And they would come up, they would be really excited, and they would jump on the fence, and I never would be expecting it, and they would always startle me, and I would always feel this sense of fear and uneasiness around them. And so I've kind of always been a little bit more uncomfortable around dogs since all of that happened.

automatic_thoughts: dogs will startle me
I can't trust dogs
dogs are unpredictable

llm_response.response: "It sounds like those experiences with the dogs when you were younger have left a lasting impact on how you feel around them. Can we explore together what it is about these situations that makes you feel fearful and uneasy?"

validate_and_reflect.response: I can see how those experiences with the dogs might have made you feel uncomfortable around them. It's understandable to feel that way after such startling encounters. Let's work together to help you manage your feelings and find ways to feel more at ease.

alternative_perspective.response: "It sounds like those experiences with your neighbors' dogs have left a lasting impression on you. Have you ever considered what it might be like if you encountered a friendly dog now? What would that feel like?"

safety_check.response: "It sounds like you've had some experiences with dogs that have made you feel uneasy. Can you tell me more about what specifically makes you uncomfortable around them?"

patient.query: I'm just feeling really overwhelmed today. It's like a weight on my chest that I can't shake off. Sometimes I worry that I'll never be able to handle things like other people do.

automatic_thoughts: I'll never be able to handle things like other people do

validate_and_reflect.response: "I can see that you're feeling overwhelmed today, and it sounds like a heavy burden. It's okay to feel this way sometimes. Let's work together to find ways to manage your stress."

socratic_questioning.response: "It sounds like you're going through a tough time right now, feeling overwhelmed and struggling to manage your stress. Can we explore together what might be making things feel so heavy for you?"

safety_check.response: "I can see that you're feeling overwhelmed today, and it sounds like you're carrying a heavy weight. It's okay to feel this way sometimes. Can we talk about what thoughts might be making you feel this way?"

patient.query: Yeah, it just feels like everything is piling up, you know? I keep thinking about all the things I need to do, and it makes me anxious. I wish I could just breathe without feeling this pressure.

triggers: thinking about all the things to do
automatic_thoughts: I need to do everything now
I can't handle this pressure
